name: Sovereign & Regulated Cloud (EU-wide)
description: Pan-European market for data-sovereign cloud infrastructure driven by GDPR, Gaia-X, EUCS certification, and national regulations. Targets any regulated enterprise or public-sector body requiring EU-only data residency, European-operated hyperscaler wrappers, and compliance-certified cloud services.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CISO, Data Protection Officer, CIO, Head of Cloud Strategy, Procurement (sovereignty-mandated)
drivers: Gaia-X and IPCEI-CIS funding for EU cloud
National sovereignty mandates (France SecNumCloud, Germany BSI C5)
Strategic autonomy goals for critical sectors

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on EU sovereign cloud market forecasts

tam.description: Total EU sovereign/regulated cloud market by 2027 (~EUR 15B)

sam.description: Portion addressable by T-Systems through Open Sovereign Cloud, Google/AWS sovereign wrappers, and T Cloud Public

som.description: Realistically capturable given T-Systems' first-mover position in sovereign cloud partnerships

competitive_landscape: OVHcloud, Ionos, Scaleway, Orange/Capgemini (Bleu), Thales/Google (S3NS), Microsoft EU Data Boundary, AWS European Sovereign Cloud
